scenarios.description: children() on element with no child nodes returns empty list (childNodeSize==0 branch)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); // no children

scenarios.description: children() with one Element child returns list of that single child (single iteration, one instanceof Element)
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Elements contains exactly one element equal to the appended child

scenarios.description: children() with multiple Element children returns list preserving insertion order (multiple iterations, all elements)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendElement("a"); parent.appendElement("b");
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Elements list is [firstChild,a then b] matching insertion sequence
pseudocode: assert result.size() == 2 && result.get(0) == a && result.get(1) == b;

scenarios.description: children() with mixed Node types filters only Element instances (TextNode and Element)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("p"); parent.appendText("text"); parent.appendElement("span"); parent.appendText("more");
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Elements contains only the <span> child at index 0

scenarios.description: children() after modifying childNodes invalidates shadow cache and updates on subsequent call
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); Element first = parent.appendElement("x"); Elements firstList = parent.children(); // cache created; then modify
scenarios.expectedResult: firstList.size()==1; new children call size==2 and contains new child
